title: astragalus siculus subsp. calabricus
intro: Astragalus siculus subsp. calabricus, also known as Italian milk-vetch, is a plant species in the legume family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-boosting properties. The health benefits associated with the plant include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and enhancing the body's natural defense against infections. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, making it a popular ingredient in supplements and natural remedies.
